title: iresine celosioides var. verticillata
intro: Iresine celosioides var. verticillata, also known as the Red Ink Plant, is a variety of the Iresine celosioides plant, a flowering plant species native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing protection against certain types of cancer. Iresine celosioides var. verticillata is typically prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and its leaves can be used to make a dye, hence its common name.
